urgent_methodology: Publisher-marked Breaking, Urgent, Alert, Just in, Developing or similar items are collected first and receive priority over standard items, unless they are liveblogs, programme previews or low-value content.

latest.title: US soldier killed and one injured after Iranian attack in Iraq
latest.summary: The US military reported that a service member was killed during a controlled detonation of unexploded ordnance from a downed Iranian drone in northern Iraq. This incident occurred a day after an attack on a base in Jordan resulted in two US soldiers' deaths and one missing.
latest.details: The US military reported that a service member was killed during a controlled detonation of unexploded ordnance from a downed Iranian drone in northern Iraq. This incident occurred a day after an attack on a base in Jordan resulted in two US soldiers' deaths and one missing. US Central Command stated that the death toll for American personnel in the ongoing conflict has now reached 17. Meanwhile, Iranian media reported that a nuclear power plant under construction was struck, and the UN's nuclear watchdog has called for restraint.
latest.full_brief: The US military reported that a service member was killed during a controlled detonation of unexploded ordnance from a downed Iranian drone in northern Iraq. This incident occurred a day after an attack on a base in Jordan resulted in two US soldiers' deaths and one missing. US Central Command stated that the death toll for American personnel in the ongoing conflict has now reached 17. Meanwhile, Iranian media reported that a nuclear power plant under construction was struck, and the UN's nuclear watchdog has called for restraint.

latest.title: Test that found source of US explosive diarrhoea outbreak was false positive, health officials…
latest.summary: The Food and Drug Administration (FDA) reported that a sample from Taylor Farms tested positive for cyclospora. However, the FDA later determined this result to be a false positive.
latest.details: The Food and Drug Administration (FDA) reported that a sample from Taylor Farms tested positive for cyclospora. However, the FDA later determined this result to be a false positive. At least 94 people have been hospitalized due to cyclosporiasis infections linked to the outbreak. Taylor Farms is voluntarily removing all iceberg lettuce sourced from central Mexico from the US market.
latest.full_brief: The Food and Drug Administration (FDA) reported that a sample from Taylor Farms tested positive for cyclospora. However, the FDA later determined this result to be a false positive. At least 94 people have been hospitalized due to cyclosporiasis infections linked to the outbreak. Taylor Farms is voluntarily removing all iceberg lettuce sourced from central Mexico from the US market.

latest.title: Norway opens new memorial for victims of 2011 massacre
latest.summary: Norway has opened a new memorial for the 77 victims of the 2011 terror attack. The memorial features a large artwork depicting a bird native to Utoeya island.
latest.details: Norway has opened a new memorial for the 77 victims of the 2011 terror attack. The memorial features a large artwork depicting a bird native to Utoeya island. Survivors and relatives of the victims attended the unveiling ceremony in Oslo. The names of all 77 victims are engraved on the memorial.
latest.full_brief: Norway has opened a new memorial for the 77 victims of the 2011 terror attack. The memorial features a large artwork depicting a bird native to Utoeya island. Survivors and relatives of the victims attended the unveiling ceremony in Oslo. The names of all 77 victims are engraved on the memorial.

latest.title: This farmer wanted to quit the cocaine industry - he couldn't
latest.summary: Farmer Perea attempted to leave the coca industry by replacing coca plants with legal crops, but faced numerous challenges. He participated in a government crop substitution program, which promised assistance that largely failed to materialize.
latest.details: Farmer Perea attempted to leave the coca industry by replacing coca plants with legal crops, but faced numerous challenges. He participated in a government crop substitution program, which promised assistance that largely failed to materialize. Perea expressed the difficulty of providing for his family without support, leading him to consider returning to coca cultivation. Colombia's coca production has reached record levels, despite efforts to promote legal alternatives.
latest.full_brief: Farmer Perea attempted to leave the coca industry by replacing coca plants with legal crops, but faced numerous challenges. He participated in a government crop substitution program, which promised assistance that largely failed to materialize. Perea expressed the difficulty of providing for his family without support, leading him to consider returning to coca cultivation. Colombia's coca production has reached record levels, despite efforts to promote legal alternatives.

latest.title: Kodak EC35 is a dirt-cheap point-and-shoot film camera
latest.summary: Reto Project is launching the Kodak EC35, a budget-friendly 35mm film camera priced at $34.99. The camera features a 25mm acrylic lens with a fixed f/10 aperture and a manual wind and rewind mechanism.
latest.details: Reto Project is launching the Kodak EC35, a budget-friendly 35mm film camera priced at $34.99. The camera features a 25mm acrylic lens with a fixed f/10 aperture and a manual wind and rewind mechanism. It is designed for simplicity, lacking advanced features like double exposure or zone focusing. The EC35 is available in various colors, including butter yellow and avocado green, with contrasting lens covers.
latest.full_brief: Reto Project is launching the Kodak EC35, a budget-friendly 35mm film camera priced at $34.99. The camera features a 25mm acrylic lens with a fixed f/10 aperture and a manual wind and rewind mechanism. It is designed for simplicity, lacking advanced features like double exposure or zone focusing. The EC35 is available in various colors, including butter yellow and avocado green, with contrasting lens covers.

latest.title: Ferry carrying 133 passengers and crew sinks off Guyana coast
latest.summary: The MV Barima ferry sank off the coast of Guyana, carrying 116 passengers and 17 crew members. So far, 67 individuals have been rescued, including 15 children, while many others remain missing.
latest.details: The MV Barima ferry sank off the coast of Guyana, carrying 116 passengers and 17 crew members. So far, 67 individuals have been rescued, including 15 children, while many others remain missing. The ferry was on its way to Port Kaituma when it capsized, prompting a search operation involving government and private vessels. The boat was reportedly within its weight capacity and equipped with life jackets and lifeboats.
latest.full_brief: The MV Barima ferry sank off the coast of Guyana, carrying 116 passengers and 17 crew members. So far, 67 individuals have been rescued, including 15 children, while many others remain missing. The ferry was on its way to Port Kaituma when it capsized, prompting a search operation involving government and private vessels. The boat was reportedly within its weight capacity and equipped with life jackets and lifeboats.

latest.title: The underwater harvest hoping for a bumper crop
latest.summary: Seagrass has a unique ability to absorb large amounts of carbon dioxide, making it a vital component in combating climate change. The area of seagrass can absorb 35 times more carbon than a tropical rainforest.
latest.details: Seagrass has a unique ability to absorb large amounts of carbon dioxide, making it a vital component in combating climate change. The area of seagrass can absorb 35 times more carbon than a tropical rainforest. Volunteers at Calshot Beach are collecting seeds from existing seagrass meadows to help restore depleted coastal areas. The UK has lost over 90% of its seagrass meadows in the last century due to various environmental pressures.
latest.full_brief: Seagrass has a unique ability to absorb large amounts of carbon dioxide, making it a vital component in combating climate change. The area of seagrass can absorb 35 times more carbon than a tropical rainforest. Volunteers at Calshot Beach are collecting seeds from existing seagrass meadows to help restore depleted coastal areas. The UK has lost over 90% of its seagrass meadows in the last century due to various environmental pressures.

latest.title: ‘It’s total devastation’: inside the Amazonian war against illegal gold mining
latest.summary: Illegal gold mining in the Amazon has led to significant destruction of Indigenous lands and natural habitats. Brazilian security forces have recently razed the illegal mining settlement of Vila Cururu as part of a campaign to eradicate such operations.
latest.details: Illegal gold mining in the Amazon has led to significant destruction of Indigenous lands and natural habitats. Brazilian security forces have recently razed the illegal mining settlement of Vila Cururu as part of a campaign to eradicate such operations. The area has suffered intense vandalism, with 4% of its forests lost between January 2024 and August 2025. The destruction in Sararé is particularly severe, with about 17.3 square miles of land devastated since the gold rush began.
latest.full_brief: Illegal gold mining in the Amazon has led to significant destruction of Indigenous lands and natural habitats. Brazilian security forces have recently razed the illegal mining settlement of Vila Cururu as part of a campaign to eradicate such operations. The area has suffered intense vandalism, with 4% of its forests lost between January 2024 and August 2025. The destruction in Sararé is particularly severe, with about 17.3 square miles of land devastated since the gold rush began.

latest.title: Huge search operation after passenger ferry sinks off coast of Guyana
latest.summary: A massive search-and-rescue operation is underway after the MV Barima ferry sank off the coast of Guyana. Authorities have launched a criminal investigation due to discrepancies in the passenger manifest.
latest.details: A massive search-and-rescue operation is underway after the MV Barima ferry sank off the coast of Guyana. Authorities have launched a criminal investigation due to discrepancies in the passenger manifest. The captain and a crew member allegedly tested positive for marijuana and are now in police custody. The ferry was certified to carry 397 passengers and had a distress call shortly before it sank.
latest.full_brief: A massive search-and-rescue operation is underway after the MV Barima ferry sank off the coast of Guyana. Authorities have launched a criminal investigation due to discrepancies in the passenger manifest. The captain and a crew member allegedly tested positive for marijuana and are now in police custody. The ferry was certified to carry 397 passengers and had a distress call shortly before it sank.

brief_methodology.pl: Komentarz powstaje wyłącznie z przeczytanego tekstu artykułu. Musi przejść niezależny przegląd AI oraz pełną kontrolę językową; surowy tekst artykułu lub RSS nie może być komentarzem awaryjnym.
brief_methodology.en: A comment is created only from the retrieved article text. It must pass an independent AI review and the complete language gate; raw article or RSS text is never a fallback comment.

comment_quality_gate.pl: Publikowany jest wyłącznie komentarz utworzony z tekstu artykułu, zatwierdzony w niezależnym przeglądzie AI i przyjęty w całości przez rygorystyczną kontrolę językową. Jedno wadliwe zdanie odrzuca cały komentarz.
comment_quality_gate.en: Only an article-derived comment approved by an independent AI review and accepted in full by the strict language gate is published. One defective sentence rejects the whole comment.

same_story_dedupe.rule: One underlying event gets one homepage card, even if multiple publishers cover it with different links.
